title: It's fun to be in Grade One!
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The first day of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The first day of school for the Grade Ones at Bahia Formosa School started with excitement among the little ones.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The first day of school for the Grade Ones at Bahia Formosa School started with excitement among the little ones."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"They reacted to teacher Linda Visser’s requests instantaneously and responded to her questions with enthusiasm."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Hands up those who can write their names,” asked Visser.","html":"“Hands up those who can write their names,” asked Visser."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"And in a flash almost the entire class’s hands were raised.","html":"And in a flash almost the entire class’s hands were raised."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Starting their new life journey also comes with a measure of discipline.","html":"Starting their new life journey also comes with a measure of discipline."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“Getting to know them, and allowing them to get to know each other” was the priority for the day, according to Visser."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Visser and teacher Thandi Ntsali spent the morning getting the little bright faces into a routine and introducing them to classroom procedures.","html":"Visser and teacher Thandi Ntsali spent the morning getting the little bright faces into a routine and introducing them to classroom procedures."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They even had a go at the building blocks provided, starting to build their school career with fun activities.","html":"They even had a go at the building blocks provided, starting to build their school career with fun activities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grade One - the first building block for their future. The new shcoolgoers Ones at Bahia Formosa School in Plettenberg Bay showed their ingenuity on the first day of school. Photo: Chris van Gass","html":"Grade One - the first building block for their future. The new shcoolgoers Ones at Bahia Formosa School in Plettenberg Bay showed their ingenuity on the first day of school. Photo: Chris van Gass"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
